allow: Bash(cmd /c "wmic process where ProcessId=10924 delete 2>nul & wmic process where ProcessId=14356 delete 2>nul & echo done")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path ''C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Downloads'', ''C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Desktop'', ''C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Pictures'' -Include ''*.png'',''*.jpg'',''*.jpeg'' -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 FullName, LastWriteTime")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path ''C:\\Users\\Administrator'' -Include ''*.png'',''*.jpg'',''*.jpeg'' -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LastWriteTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddDays\(-7\) } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object FullName, LastWriteTime, Length")
